summary: This is a brief announcement post where Cathy O'Neil promotes an upcoming talk about her book at an Alt Banking meeting associated with the Occupy movement. The post provides logistical details including time, date, and location at Columbia University's International Affairs Building. No substantive arguments or analysis are presented in the post itself.
key_points: Announcement of a book talk at Alt Banking, a group connected to the Occupy Wall Street movement
Event held at Columbia University's International Affairs Building
Demonstrates O'Neil's engagement with activist and alternative finance communities
key_insight: This post serves purely as an event announcement and contains no substantive content to analyze.
